description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its softly toned leather upper and elegant bronze hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for genuine leather and a high quality of construction, you can expand your bag collection with this accessory. Height: 20cm Width: 33cm Depth: 10cm Tonal leather upper with contrast stitch detailing and a metallic brand badge on the front A flap with a magnetic button closure on the front One main compartment with a zippered separator, a zippered pocket and two pouches Two handles Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
